name: TerrAscend Corp.
summary: PART I Overview The Company is a leading North American cannabis company. The Company has vertically-integrated licensed operations in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, Maryland and California. In addition, the Company has retail operations in Ohio and Ontario, Canada with a majority-owned dispensary in Toronto, Ontario, Canada.
